name: PER_CHECKLISTS_VL
query: SELECT B.CHECKLIST_ID, T.NAME, T.DESCRIPTION, T.DISPLAY_NAME_FORMAT, T.MESSAGE_SUB_TITLE, T.COMPLETION_MESSAGE, B.CHECKLIST_CATEGORY, B.EVENT_REASON_ID, B.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, B.ATTRIBUTE1, B.ATTRIBUTE2, B.ATTRIBUTE3, B.ATTRIBUTE4, B.ATTRIBUTE5, B.ATTRIBUTE6, B.ATTRIBUTE7, B.ATTRIBUTE8, B.ATTRIBUTE9, B.ATTRIBUTE10, B.ATTRIBUTE11, B.ATTRIBUTE12, B.ATTRIBUTE13, B.ATTRIBUTE14, B.ATTRIBUTE15, B.ATTRIBUTE16, B.ATTRIBUTE17, B.ATTRIBUTE18, B.ATTRIBUTE19, B.ATTRIBUTE20, B.ATTRIBUTE21, B.ATTRIBUTE22, B.ATTRIBUTE23, B.ATTRIBUTE24, B.ATTRIBUTE25, B.ATTRIBUTE26, B.ATTRIBUTE27, B.ATTRIBUTE28, B.ATTRIBUTE29, B.ATTRIBUTE30, B.INFORMATION_CATEGORY, B.INFORMATION1, B.INFORMATION2, B.INFORMATION3, B.INFORMATION4, B.INFORMATION5, B.INFORMATION6, B.INFORMATION7, B.INFORMATION8, B.INFORMATION9, B.INFORMATION10, B.INFORMATION11, B.INFORMATION12, B.INFORMATION13, B.INFORMATION14, B.INFORMATION15, B.INFORMATION16, B.INFORMATION17, B.INFORMATION18, B.INFORMATION19, B.INFORMATION20, B.INFORMATION21, B.INFORMATION22, B.INFORMATION23, B.INFORMATION24, B.INFORMATION25, B.INFORMATION26, B.INFORMATION27, B.INFORMATION28, B.INFORMATION29, B.INFORMATION30, B.MODULE_ID, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER1, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER2, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER3, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER4, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER5, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER6, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER7, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER8, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER9, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER10, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER11, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER12, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER13, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER14, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER15, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER16, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER17, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER18, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER19, B.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER20, B.ATTRIBUTE_DATE1, B.ATTRIBUTE_DATE2, B.ATTRIBUTE_DATE3, B.ATTRIBUTE_DATE4, B.ATTRIBUTE_DATE5, B.ATTRIBUTE_DATE6, B.ATTRIBUTE_DATE7, B.ATTRIBUTE_DATE8, B.ATTRIBUTE_DATE9, B.ATTRIBUTE_DATE10, B.ATTRIBUTE_DATE11, B.ATTRIBUTE_DATE12, B.ATTRIBUTE_DATE13, B.ATTRIBUTE_DATE14, B.ATTRIBUTE_DATE15, B.LEGISLATION_CODE, B.CHECKLIST_CODE, B.ACTIVE_INACTIVE_FLAG, B.ALLOW_ALLOCATION_CREATE, B.ALLOW_ALLOCATION_DELETE, B.ALLOW_ALLOCATION_UPDATE, B.SGUID SGUID, B.SEED_DATA_SOURCE, B.ELIGIBILITY_PROFILE_ID, B.ALLOCATED_ON, B.OFFSET_DAYS, B.DATE_FROM, B.DATE_TO, T.CHECKLIST_DETAILS, T.MESSAGE_TITLE, T.MESSAGE_TEXT, T.USER_DISPLAY_NAME, B.COMPLETED_ON, B.COMPLETION_OFFSET_DAYS, B.TRIGGER_TYPE, B.BACKGROUND_IMAGE_URL, B.CHECKLIST_SUB_CATEGORY, B.BACKGROUND_IMAGE, B.CROPPED_BACKGROUND_IMAGE, B.CHECKLIST_FEATURE1, B.CHECKLIST_FEATURE2, B.CHECKLIST_FEATURE3, B.CHECKLIST_FEATURE4, B.CHECKLIST_FEATURE5, B.CHECKLIST_FEATURE6, B.CHECKLIST_FEATURE7, B.CHECKLIST_FEATURE8, B.CHECKLIST_FEATURE9, B.CHECKLIST_FEATURE10, B.CHECKLIST_FEATURE_DETAILS, B.EVALUATION_MODE, B.ASSIGNED_TEMPLATE_ID, B.FCL_TEMPLATE_ID, B.COMBINED_TASK_TEMPLATE_ID, B.BACKGROUND_THUMBNAIL_URL, B.PROCESSING_MODE, B.OBSOLETE_FLAG, B.LEVEL_CODE, B.LEVEL_VALUE, B.ARCHIVE_OFFSET, B.PURGE_OFFSET, B.CONTEXTUAL_ACTION, B.CONTEXT, B.SECURITY_ENABLED, B.RAW_IMAGE_CONTENT_ID, B.RAW_IMAGE_URL, B.BACKGROUND_IMAGE_CONTENT_ID, B.ACCESS_GROUP_ID, B.IMAGE_FILE_NAME, B.ALL_ROLES_VIEW_ASSIGNED, B.RECURRENT_FLAG, B.GENERATE_ATOM_FEED, B.ATOM_FEED_CONFIGURATION, B.OBJECT_REFERENCE_ID, B.OBJECT_REFERENCE_ID1, B.OBJECT_REFERENCE_ID2, B.OBJECT_REFERENCE_KEY1, B.OBJECT_REFERENCE_KEY2, B.SUBJECT_TYPE, B.USER_GUID, B.TASK_GROUP, B.OBJECT_REFERENCE_KEY, B.DISPLAY_TYPE, B.ENABLE_EXTERNAL_FLAG, B.JOURNEY_DISPLAY_MODE, B.ASSIGNED_CONTENT_TYPE, B.ASSIGNED_CONTENT_DEFN_ID, B.FCL_CONTENT_TYPE, B.FCL_CONTENT_DEFN_ID, B.ALLOCATION_CONTROL_CODE, B.ACCESS_LEVEL, B.ALLOCATION_TIMEZONE FROM PER_CHECKLISTS_B B, PER_CHECKLISTS_TL T WHERE B.CHECKLIST_ID = T.CHECKLIST_ID AND T.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
